name: DW · Fact GL Transaction
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS gl_transaction_id,
    'GL-' || lpad(gs::text, 7, '0')                                            AS journal_ref,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('GLDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1095)::int) AS txn_date,
    (ARRAY['4000 Revenue','5000 COGS','6000 Opex','6100 Payroll','7000 Marketing','8000 Tax'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('GLACCT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS account,
    (ARRAY['Revenue','COGS','Operating Expense','Payroll','Marketing','Tax'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('GLACCT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS account_category, -- same salt as account
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('GLSTORE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50)     AS store_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('GLEMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)      AS employee_id,
    CASE WHEN (('x'||substr(md5('GLDR'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2) = 0 THEN 'Debit' ELSE 'Credit' END AS entry_type,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('GLAMT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5000000)/100.0)::numeric, 2) AS amount
FROM generate_series(1, 5000) AS gs
